# 用于TCP客户端创建子线程的方法，阻塞式接收\n while True:
# Method used for TCP client to create sub-threads, blocking reception
    while True:
        recv_msg = self.socketClientID.recv(1024)
        if recv_msg:
            msg = recv_msg.decode('utf-8')
            self.textBrowser.insertPlainText(msg)
        else:
            self.socketClientID.close()
            msg = 'Disconnect from server\n'
            self.statusbar.showMessage(msg)
            break
